title: The Marrying Kind
actors: Judy Holliday, Aldo Ray, Madge Kennedy
plot: Florence and Chet Keefer have had a troublesome marriage. Whilst in the middle of a divorce hearing, the judge encourages them to remember the good times they have had, hoping that the marriage can be saved. Starring Judy Holliday...
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 nominations total
